use_cases: Displaying a user-friendly error message when a requested page or route cannot be found
Serving as a fallback page for broken links or mistyped URLs
Providing navigation guidance after encountering a missing page
Maintaining brand consistency with styled error states across applications
ai_summary: A full-screen 404 error page with a dark blue gradient background featuring abstract SVG wave shapes. The component displays a bold white '404' heading with a friendly message indicating the page was not found. The design is clean, minimalist, and centered for immediate user attention, making it suitable as a universal not-found fallback for any web application.
